## Author
- Name: Andreas Ehstand
- ORCID: 0009-0006-3773-7796
- Wikidata (person): Q138634675

## Programme
- Name: AUGMANITAI / PERMANITAI / NEOMANITAI / ROBMANITAI Research Programme
- Wikidata: Q139491295
- DOI registration: programme is DOI-registered on Zenodo with access restricted; metadata-level provenance public via DataCite.
